executives.name: Dale Verran
executives.background: Mr. Verran is a Professional Geoscientist with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously Vice President, Exploration for Denison Mines Corp. and has held senior roles with various exploration and mining companies.

executives.name: Derrick Gill
executives.background: Mr. Gill has over 35 years of experience in the mining and construction industries. He has held senior executive positions with major international mining companies and has extensive experience in project management.

executives.name: Gareth Thomas
executives.background: Mr. Thomas has over 18 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in project development and operations. He was previously with Wesdome Gold Mines Ltd. and has held various technical and management roles.

executives.name: Melinda Montgomery
executives.background: Ms. Montgomery is a legal professional with over 30 years of experience in corporate law and securities regulation. She has served as a director for several TSX-listed companies.
